mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly increasing present equity valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns during rate declines are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in the unemployment rate above 7.0 percent signals an imminent labor market deterioration and recession risk, triggering risk-off sentiment and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 65% of triggered instances despite the negative signal, or the threshold fails to predict direction with > 55% accuracy over a 5-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month increases in retail sales and housing starts confirm broad-based consumer demand expansion, driving corporate revenue growth expectations and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive momentum in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 60-day returns with > 58% accuracy, or the interaction term loses statistical significance (p > 0.10) in a multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production during a confirmed economic expansion regime reflects strengthening manufacturing output and capacity utilization, which supports near-term earnings revisions and positive S&P 500 forward returns over five trading days.
failure_condition: Positive INDPRO momentum yields negative 5-day forward returns in > 60% of expansion regime observations, or the signal predictive power vanishes when filtered to expansion periods only.

mechanism_narrative: A year-over-year inflation reading exceeding 3.0 percent forces markets to price in aggressive central bank tightening, which compresses equity multiples and generates negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX delivers positive 20-day returns in > 62% of instances when CPIAUCSL YoY exceeds 3.0 percent, or the threshold shows no statistical edge in out-of-sample walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate indicates a tightening labor market that boosts wage growth and consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the quarter.
failure_condition: The combined PAYEMS and UNRATE signal fails to predict positive 60-day returns with > 57% accuracy, or the interaction effect becomes statistically insignificant (p > 0.10) in a multivariate model.

mechanism_narrative: A positive quarter-over-quarter trend in real GDP growth confirms underlying economic momentum, which sustains corporate profit expansion and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Positive GDPC1 growth rates are followed by negative 60-day forward returns in > 60% of observations, or the series shows a Rank IC below 0.01 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp month-over-month decline in industrial production signals an abrupt supply-side contraction that threatens near-term corporate output and earnings, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO MoM change falls below -0.5 percent
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 65% of triggered instances despite the negative signal, or the threshold fails to predict direction with > 55% accuracy over a 5-year sample.
